interactions.summary: Jiang says Christian line-history is aimed at the second coming and argues that Christian Zionist end-times belief is one driver of Middle East conflict.
He presents Hegel as a line-model variation: ideas conflict dialectically and are transformed into new ideas, influencing Marxism.
He rejects cycle and line as insufficiently predictive, defines truth as explanation plus prediction, introduces oceanic currents, and starts building culture as meta-reality.

claims.claim: Jiang argues that Christian Zionist belief in war as the trigger for Jesus returning is one of the main causes of Middle East conflict.
Hegelian dialectic is a line model because conflict between ideas is still understood as progress toward truth.
claims.temporal_scope: Definition and classification in this lecture.

claims.claim: Jiang says history has failed as a discipline when it cannot use past patterns to explain Trump, Ukraine, or the Middle East and predict what comes next.
Truth, for Jiang in this lecture, must explain why something happened and predict future developments.
The oceanic currents model imagines the world as interacting ecosystems whose currents collide and produce new developments without moral judgment.
claims.temporal_scope: Core model introduced in this lecture.

claims.claim: Culture is meta-reality: the understanding of the world from which all other understandings derive.

signature_moments.why_it_matters: It condenses Jiang's causal claim that metaphysical belief can generate geopolitical disaster.

signature_moments.source_phrase: If it's truthful, then it predicts
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It is the methodological hinge from history as memory to history as forecast.

signature_moments.moment: The world becomes an ocean full of colliding currents.
signature_moments.source_phrase: Imagine the world as a huge ocean
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It names the episode's governing metaphor.

signature_moments.moment: Culture is the meta-reality underneath every other identity.
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It makes culture the deep operating layer of Jiang's historical model.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Christians Jiang says want Middle East war because they believe end-times crisis will force Jesus to return.
A conflict or conversation between ideas that produces a new idea while still moving toward truth.
Jiang's model of history as interacting cultural ecosystems and currents that collide, energize, and develop without moralized line or cycle assumptions.
The underlying cultural understanding from which other understandings of the world derive.

chronology_notes.note: The Christian Zionism diagnosis is attached to Jiang's 2025-02-18 framing of ongoing Middle East conflict.
